title: Raw Archi Query Format
description: Single query object for Archi benchmarking — supports SOURCES mode, RAGAS mode, or both

question.description: The question to be answered by the Archi instance

sources.description: List of sources (URLs, ticket IDs) containing the answer. Required when using SOURCES mode

answer.description: Expected answer to the question. Required when using RAGAS mode

sources_match_field.description: Metadata fields to match sources against. Defaults to file_name from config if omitted
